plugins.name: docs
plugins.readme_excerpt: This folder contains the documentation source files for Spec Kit, built using [DocFX](https://dotnet.github.io/docfx/).

plugins.name: extensions
plugins.readme_excerpt: Extension system for [Spec Kit](https://github.com/github/spec-kit) - add new functionality without bloating the core framework.

plugins.name: integrations
plugins.readme_excerpt: The integration catalog enables discovery, versioning, and distribution of AI agent integrations for Spec Kit.
